title: 1000/10  experience
text: Gifa’s transport service was excellent and top class. The price was very reasonable, and much lower than other options we looked at- other driving companies tend to use Gifa’s cars anyway!  Gifa himself drove us there and made sure we were comfortable and happy from start to finish. He also provided 5 star company and had us laughing the whole drive long . The car was spacious, air conditioned and had portable Wi-Fi. If you have anywhere you need to drive to/from Botswana, Gifa is the only way to go.

title: Very amazing.
text: Amazing. We booked last year and paid. He was on time, amazing tour guide. Well informed and we got souvenirs from Gifas transport. Beautiful travel mugs and key holders.

title: Flexible and reliable. Excellent service.
text: Gift runs a very well organised and comprehensive service, including short and long distance drivers, and coaches etc. He is a really nice guy, very committed to good customer service, with a wealth of local knowledge.

ownerResponse.text: Thank you for taking your precious time to leave a review, we are here to serve and provide a safe journey and we are because of you.

title: I totally recommend
text: We had a Gaborone city tour and I must say it was amazing. Our guide was very helpful and attentive, giving us a lot of information. I recommend.

title: Highly recommend!!
text: Booked a driver to take me from Gaborone to Madikwe Game Reserve. Highly recommend. Excellent driver, perfectly on time, friendly, knowledgable, also helpful negotiating the border. Prices are competitive and perfectly reasonable.

ownerResponse.text: We appreciate your contribution and recommendations we will remain doing what we do best which is serving our customers the best we can and help to make travels easy.

title: Gifa is the Man! Best Taxi Driver in Gaborone
text:
I went to Gaborone last year and Gifa was very flexible, responsive and had good rates. He's really knowledgeable on the area and taught me and my wife a lot about Botswana. It was like having a tour guide.

He even took me all the way out to Molepolole for a football match and stayed to watch the game with me. Craziest of all was that he loaned me money to buy a football jersey. Best taxi driver I've ever had.

ownerResponse.text: Ooh hahaha OMG I just had to laugh because this review stroke back memories of that time, yes I'm pleased to continuing providing the best service and safe driving while sharing the insights about my country. We are here to serve we are servants of choice.

title: An Excellent Transportation Company
text: An excellent transportation company headed by Gifa himself, whom we had the pleasure of meeting personally. Gifa drove us from Gabarone, Botswana to Madikwe Game reserve in South Africa. Gifa collected us from South Africa for the return trip to Gaborone, from where we flew to Jo’burg and ultimately England. Gifa Transport are trustworthy and because of Gifa’s local and croos-border knowledge, we consider ourselves very lucky to have the services of Gifa transport during our visit to Botswana and South Africa.

ownerResponse.text:
Thank you very much and I'm happy to have driven you myself. You're really good people other than being my clients, surely we try all best to do the same service we gave and we shall continue do so to others.

Best Regards

Dimpho (Gifa)

title: Gifa offers a really good service
text: Gifa offers a really good service.  At my recent stay in Gaborone, he was able to take me to a game reserve in South Africa.  Punctual, nice clean car.  He was really helpful when crossing the border telling me exactly what I needed to do and where.  When there was a problem on the return, he negotiated for me to get through quicker.  He was good company for the two hour drive and I learned alot about Botswana from him.  We had a problem with a burst tyre on the way back, in the middle of the game reserve, but he was really calm and got it fixed.  I felt very safe.

ownerResponse.text:
Thank you for choosing us its our duty to make travel easy for clients like yourself, but mostly it was nice to meet you and drive you to and from safely we will continue do a good job to others too.

Kind Regards

Dimpho Motlhabi

title: Avoid Gifa, if your plans change he will not refund any money
text:
After doing some research we decided to book Gifa (operated by a man named Dimpho Motlhabi) for a large group (20+) transport lasting about 10 days in Botswana and South Africa. Our first conversations were very pleasant and the company was very prompt and professional. About one month before we were to arrive Dimpho reached out to explain that we had not confirmed and that he could only hold our spot for a few more days unless he was paid for the trip. We asked about their refund policy and found it satisfactory so we sent the money. Four days later, the trip was canceled and we immediately notified Dimpho that we would no longer need his services and would like to start the refund process. That’s where our nightmare began. 

When we asked for a refund since the trip was canceled an entire month in advance, Dimpho claimed that we would only receive a 70% refund since he had already paid for hotels, drivers, and food (food??), etc. Even though on the website and in our WhatsApp chat he specifically wrote that cancellations within “72 hours only 50% will be refunded” and “cancellation in 7 days left 30%.” To reiterate, we cancelled one month before the trip date and four days after sending Dimpho the money. But the best we can hope for will be 70% of our money back. 

We have messaged Dimpho almost daily asking for updates on our refund and he is always busy, or out of town, or being investigated by BURS, or had his accounts frozen etc. then the promises started.

On Tuesday 6/27/2023 “everything is okay now we will be able to send refund very soon,” then did not reply to our repeated attempts at clarifying when that would be. On Monday 7/3/2023 “I will see that it is sent to you before this end of the week,” no refund. The following Tuesday, “just got here now 6:30am will see through that,” again no refund. This trend has continued into August and we still have no refund. 

All in all, our experience has been horrible. Dimpho/Gifa routinely go days/weeks without answering our texts or calls and every deadline/promise that he has made has been utterly false. Dimpho might be wonderful at pickups and drop-offs but he has lied to us repeatedly and is a dishonest business man. It has been almost four months since we asked for a refund and we still have not received a dime. It's about $6,000 that he's refusing to return. 

Be warned about doing business with Gifa or Dimpho Motlhabi.

ownerResponse.text: Hello XK Group, Tom Chase , Nick Hulbert, Kevin Hulbert and many more working with your company. It's not true infact it is only you in my 18 years of this job I didn't refund because you were threatening me about your FBI founder of your company and your shady connections with former President family and American Embassy also remember you wanted me to run on your watch yet I was simply following procedures. Then I said for that reason I will stop funding you so that you have time to try damage my Company like you said you have power, learn to be nice people will nice with you.

title: Great transport in Botswana - local or long distance!
text:
Spent a great 3 days with Dimpho and Buago from Gifa's Transport in the comfy back seat of their SUV, transiting across the Kalahari from Gabarone to Windhoek, Namibia with fun overnight stops in Kang and Ghanzi.   

We hired Dimpho as a driver - not expecting a guide service - but we learned a lot about the people, culture, geography and wildlife of Botswana and there was a little bit of an adventure for everyone 😄 

Made all the arrangements a month ahead by email, WhatsApp and a 50% deposit by PayPal and every aspect of the trip went very smoothly.  If you need to get anywhere in Botswana from Gabarone Gifa's Transport is cheaper than flying and far superior to the bus if you've got the time to sightsee!

ownerResponse.text:
Thank you very much yes that was a great trip I'm glad we did the trip with you, and truth be told you are very humble Americans you have represented them well hahaha we will always do great with others too.

Best Regards

Dimpho Motlhabi Gifa

title: Urgent Suitcase Transport
text:
Private transfer from Gaborone to Ghanzi - this  was for my suitcase that got stuck in Gaborone at customs after I shipped it

Needed a quick and reliable solution to have it delivered to me (as I left Botswana the next day) 

Gifa’s Transport handled it perfectly! Picked it up at DHL and drove all night for 10h+ so that received it in time before I departed from my hotel

Great communication all the way, 100% reliable and secure - can recommend!

ownerResponse.text:
Yes I remember that emergency we really had to be there for you and make sure you have your staff and be at ease even if it meant driving all night it was our pleasure to do so and proud to be chosen to do the job we will continue the same service to others too.

Kind Regards

Miss Boago T Phiri PA to the
Founder Mr Dimpho Motlhabi
M/D

title: Excellent service in Gaborone
text: Dim pho was super helpful from the moment I messaged him to arrange a pickup till the moment he dropped us off. Instantly likeable, he provided us with excellent advice about Gaborone. We will certainly continue to use his service while we are here.

ownerResponse.text:
Thank you for the review I surely do my job with all I can but it is of great people like you who can change the world by taking your precious time to write the fact about how service was delivered to you when you requested one. Stay blessed

Best Regards

Dimpho Motlhabi Gifa

title: Everything you could want from a taxi service and more
text:
Smart, professional, with excellent communication and pleasant company. Using Gifa’s transport in Gabarone is always a pleasure. Gifa mentioned that he also does long distance trips between Jo’burg and Gaborone for 3500 Pula, and you can take it at a leisurely pace and stop along the way. Will definitely keep this in mind! Thanks Gifa!

Naledi

ownerResponse.text:
Thank you so much I got to read our reviews and I'm so overwhelmed to see that they are great people like you who took their time to write their reviews and say the truth to the world about our services. Stay blessed.

Best Regards

Dimpho Motlhabi Gifa.

title: Professional and Reliable Service
text: On time professional service. Gifa is also very knowledgeable and reliable. This is tip notch service that can be trusted. My second time to Botswana and GIFA was the first car servcie I called!

ownerResponse.text:
I got to read our reviews and all I can say is be blessed to one of those people who can change the world by appreciating another person's effort. We will keep providing best service and keep our cars in good condition for  our clients, it was nice indeed to have met you.

Kind Regards

Dimpho Motlhabi Gifa.
